subject: Migrate to HTTPS from HTTP - VNFSDK
commit_message:
Migrate to HTTPS from HTTP - VNFSDK

Issue-ID: OJSI-154

Signed-off-by: Kanagaraj Manickam <kanagaraj.manickam@hauwei.com>
Change-Id: I7d3d3faa5e17d68051b0816fa5834b88817c3cf1

Patch Set 1:

Do we have a patchset to change robot_properties.py ?

 306 # vnfsdk info - everything is from the private oam network (also called onap private network)
 307 GLOBAL_VNFSDK_SERVER_PROTOCOL = "http"
 308 GLOBAL_VNFSDK_SERVER_PORT = "8702"

Patch Set 1:

I don't think so.
as the other one, how do we proceed?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I don't think so.
> as the other one, how do we proceed?

as the OOM config can be in 3 different repos (OOM / AAI/ Robot) we will have such issues everytime one of the component is impacted...
even if we create a patchset, with the build chain, the probably to get the docker sync is very low..

the best solution will be to centralize the config IMHO (as proposed by Sylvain some weeks ago)

Patch Set 1:

for a two line change to port/protocol in robot we can force the merges with manual inspection of the respective changes

Patch Set 1:

+1 For Sylvain's idea of centralizing the config and even +2 for "bring your robot config with you" rather than a common centralized one

Patch Set 1:

can someone approve this commit? thanks

+ adaptation needed on robot side
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
